entries.title: Auto Model Selection
entries.description: CreateAI can automatically recommend the best AI model for a project based on the user's instructions, removing manual model comparison.

entries.title: Knowledge Base Redesign
entries.description: Redesigned Knowledge Base experience with usability improvements and stronger Google Drive integration.

entries.title: Claude 4.7 Opus Available
entries.description: Claude 4.7 Opus added to the model lineup, offering enhanced reasoning capabilities.

entries.title: AI Avatars (Pilot)
entries.description: Persona-based, multimodal avatar interactions combining conversation, voice, and visuals; available case-by-case for select pilots.

entries.title: Expanded Integrations
entries.description: Expanded Model Context Protocol (MCP) support and OpenAI-compatible Builder API endpoints for external tool connections.

entries.title: Deprecated Model Removed: Claude 4 Opus
entries.description: Claude 4 Opus removed following deprecation to prevent errors from unsupported models.

entries.title: Project List Pagination
entries.description: Projects now load in pages, improving performance for users with many projects.

entries.title: Improved Project Editing Experience
entries.description: "Edit View" action relocated for better discoverability.

entries.title: Marketplace Search Improvements
entries.description: Marketplace search moved to the backend for better performance and scalability.

entries.title: Improved Chat Reliability
entries.description: Improvements to chat history, conversation loading, and overall reliability.

entries.title: Analytics Dashboard Improvements
entries.description: Improved visibility and scrolling on the project analytics dashboard.

entries.title: Smarter Agent Search Behavior
entries.description: Agent web search uses a more efficient strategy for simple queries.

entries.title: Universal System Prompt Support
entries.description: Added support for universal system prompts for more consistent project behavior.

entries.title: API Key Improvements
entries.description: Fixed API keys appearing under the wrong project; improved key request UI.

entries.title: Chat Experience Fixes
entries.description: Fixed jumbled text on Enter during response generation and 404 errors creating/opening chats.

entries.title: Evaluation Tool Fixes
entries.description: Resolved backend issues affecting evaluation tool functionality.

entries.title: Project Management Fixes
entries.description: Fixed errors deleting older pre-autosync projects; improved project/memory management.

entries.title: Security Updates
entries.description: Security enhancements for Google Drive integrations, notifications, and memory functionality.

entries.title: Additional Improvements
entries.description: Improved avatar responsiveness/listening behavior and backend agent functionality.

entries.title: API Key Access (In-Platform)
entries.description: Users can now request and manage API keys directly within CreateAI projects.

entries.title: Cross-Conversation Memory
entries.description: CreateAI retains context across chats for more consistent, personalized interactions.

entries.title: AIR Platform (AI Research Acceleration Platform)
entries.description: Builder now provides access to locally hosted models (Gemma 4, Llama 4 Scout) on ASU-managed infrastructure.

entries.title: New Models: Gemma 4, Llama 4 Scout/Maverick, GPT 5.5
entries.description: New model options added to the platform.

entries.title: Deprecated Model Removed: Claude 3.7 Sonnet
entries.description: Claude 3.7 Sonnet removed following deprecation.

entries.title: Banner Image Controls Improved
entries.description: Reposition and resize banner images before saving, with a preview (recommended 1920x350px).

entries.title: Improved Model Selection
entries.description: Scroll through models with the keyboard and press Enter to select.

entries.title: Improved Handling of Large Inputs
entries.description: Inputs over 30kb auto-convert to text files instead of returning an error.

entries.title: Auto-Save Improvements
entries.description: Faster saving with a "Saving..." status indicator; Publish button disabled during saves.

entries.title: Navigation & Interface Updates
entries.description: Long titles wrap correctly; "New Chat" replaces "Reset"; "Open as Viewer" added; "Created by" label removed.

entries.title: Project & Chat Improvements
entries.description: More reliable chat loading, consistent model switching, file uploads and date/time access enabled by default.

entries.title: Evaluation Tool Improvements
entries.description: Fixed questions appearing across projects, reappearing after deletion, and stuck loading states.

entries.title: Accessibility Improvements
entries.description: Better color contrast, clearer form labels, and improved keyboard navigation across the platform.

entries.title: LaTeX and Markdown Rendering Fix
entries.description: Fixed rendering issues in queries and responses.

entries.title: Project Icon Clearing Fix
entries.description: Fixed project icon clearing when pressing Enter.

entries.title: Duplicate Project Name Messaging
entries.description: Updated messaging and removed a non-functional "replace" option.

entries.title: General Reliability Fixes
entries.description: General fixes to improve platform reliability and performance.

entries.title: New Models
entries.description: Gemini 3.1 Pro, GPT 5.3 Instant, GPT 5.4 (Experimental), GPT 5.4 Mini/Nano, and Nano Banana Pro 2 (API) added.

entries.title: Marketplace Improvements
entries.description: Project owners control whether others can view instructions and copy projects, add categories, and view more project detail.

entries.title: Domain-Specific Accuracy (Evaluation)
entries.description: Owners can evaluate project accuracy in its subject area using sample Q&A pairs, generating a score.

entries.title: Project Personalization
entries.description: Customize projects with a banner image and icon from personal images or a suggested library.

entries.title: Media Library Update
entries.description: Select multiple files at once for easier deletion.

entries.title: File Support Update
entries.description: Upload and use .ps1 files in Builder and Chat.

entries.title: Auto-Save Updates
entries.description: Projects save automatically as changes are made.

entries.title: Default Model Update
entries.description: New projects start with GPT 4.1 Mini by default.

entries.title: Canvas Improvements
entries.description: Canvas content refreshes automatically to stay current.

entries.title: Improved Navigation and Access
entries.description: Clearer messaging when accessing restricted pages.

entries.title: Model Selection Improvements
entries.description: Scroll through models with the keyboard and press Enter to select.

entries.title: Improved Handling of Large Inputs
entries.description: Inputs over 30kb convert to text files automatically before submission.

entries.title: Cleaner Experimental Model Experience
entries.description: Simplified messaging around experimental models.

entries.title: Canvas Embedding Fix
entries.description: Projects can now be embedded in Canvas without issues.

entries.title: User Management Fix
entries.description: Adding/removing users from a project now updates immediately without a refresh.

entries.title: Auto-Save Typing Fix
entries.description: Text fields no longer lose focus while typing.

entries.title: Slider Behavior Fix
entries.description: Model setting sliders now snap correctly to valid values.

entries.title: General Stability Improvements
entries.description: Several reliability and smoothness improvements across CreateAI.

entries.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro Now Available
entries.description: Added as a new model option in the platform.

entries.title: Improved Loading Feedback
entries.description: "Still thinking..." message appears when a response takes longer than expected.

entries.title: Video File Support
entries.description: Upload MP4 and WEBM files in the Chat Media Library.

entries.title: Direct Privacy Access
entries.description: "Privacy settings" link in profile opens cookie management directly.

entries.title: URL Auto-Sync Controls
entries.description: Choose how often URL sources refresh: Daily, Weekly, Monthly, or None.

entries.title: Duplicate Upload Prevention
entries.description: Prevents accidentally uploading the same file multiple times.

entries.title: More Specific Error Messages
entries.description: Clearer error messages for failed Knowledge Base uploads.

entries.title: Accurate "Last Published" Timestamp
entries.description: Timestamp now updates correctly when files are removed from the Knowledge Base.

entries.title: Improved Print Chat Experience
entries.description: Saving chats as PDF no longer cuts off content after the first page.

entries.title: Model Display Improvements
entries.description: Model names display correctly after refreshing the chat page.

entries.title: Mobile Model Selector Fix
entries.description: Model dropdown no longer appears underneath the keyboard on mobile.

entries.title: Feedback Form Improvements
entries.description: Photo uploads no longer require a double click; 5-photo limit properly enforced.

entries.title: Markdown Preservation
entries.description: Markdown formatting preserved across Builder and Chat responses.

entries.title: Improved Layout Spacing
entries.description: Spacing and alignment improved on larger screens.

entries.title: Accessibility Improvements
entries.description: Improved nested interactive controls, color contrast, ARIA attributes, keyboard access, and screen reader labeling.

entries.title: Enter Key Interruption Fix
entries.description: Fixed pressing Enter interrupting response generation.

entries.title: Syllabot Messaging Fix
entries.description: Resolved Syllabot messaging persisting when switching between projects.

entries.title: Drag-and-Drop Upload Fix
entries.description: Fixed duplicate drag-and-drop upload behavior.

entries.title: URL Ingestion Fallback Reliability
entries.description: Improved fallback reliability for URL ingestion.

entries.title: Upload Timeout Handling
entries.description: Improved handling for stalled file uploads.

entries.title: Knowledge Base Auto-Save Indicator
entries.description: "Auto-saved" message now appears on the Knowledge Base page.

entries.title: Expanded File Support
entries.description: Added support for .vtt, .stt, .v, .sv, .yaml, .toml, .tex, .tf files in Knowledge Base, Google Drive, and uploads.

entries.title: Copy Enhancements
entries.description: Dedicated buttons to copy the prompt, response, or both in one click.

entries.title: Model Expansion: Gemini 3 Flash and Pro
entries.description: New models now available in the platform.

entries.title: Dashboard Flexibility
entries.description: Dashboard items now support standard open-in-new-tab behavior.

entries.title: WEBP File Uploads
entries.description: Upload .webp image files into Builder and Chat.

entries.title: Upload Without Prompt
entries.description: Files can be uploaded without entering a prompt; default instruction applied automatically.

entries.title: Improved Button Feedback
entries.description: Regenerate and New Chat buttons greyed out while a response generates.

entries.title: Syllabot Template Improvements
entries.description: "Go to knowledge" prompt persists until a file is successfully uploaded.

entries.title: Auto-Publish Projects
entries.description: Toggling ASU-wide access now automatically publishes the project.

entries.title: Faster Marketplace Browsing
entries.description: Marketplace now shows 50 projects per page by default, up from 10.

entries.title: Model Search Is Back
entries.description: Search by name in the model selection dropdown again.

entries.title: Markdown-Friendly Copying
entries.description: Markdown formatting preserved when copying responses into tools like Google Docs.

entries.title: Persistent Tooltips Fix
entries.description: Fixed lingering tooltips on viewer message buttons.

entries.title: Duplicate File Uploads Messaging
entries.description: Clearer error messaging for duplicate uploads to local files or Google Drive.

entries.title: Mobile New Project Fix
entries.description: Fixed a blank screen when creating a new project on mobile.

entries.title: Custom Instructions Save Fix
entries.description: Fixed copy/paste or select-all/backspace not triggering the Save button.

entries.title: "Report a Problem" Reset Fix
entries.description: Fixed clicking this on the viewer side resetting the current chat.

entries.title: Share Tab Scroll Fix
entries.description: Fixed horizontal scrollbar issue in "Users with access" on smaller screens.

entries.title: Stuck Uploads Auto-Fail
entries.description: Files stuck "Uploading" over 15 minutes now fail, allowing deletion.

entries.title: URL Upload Reliability
entries.description: ASU URLs now correctly fall back to Firecrawl if iSearch is unavailable.

entries.title: Mobile Model Selector Overlap Fix
entries.description: Resolved model selector overlapping the Save button on mobile.

entries.title: Accepted File Types Cleanup
entries.description: Removed unsupported .MOV files from Knowledge Base accepted types.

entries.title: Canvas Integration for Builder
entries.description: Faculty can add AI projects directly to Canvas courses.

entries.title: "Report a Problem" Button
entries.description: Users can flag technical issues directly from the viewer interface.

entries.title: New Models
entries.description: Gemini 2.5 (Flash/Flash Lite/Pro), Claude 4.5 (Haiku/Opus/Sonnet), GPT 5.1 & 5.2 added.

entries.title: Easier Save & Publish Flow
entries.description: Clear status indicators: greyed-out (saved), yellow (unsaved), green checkmark (ready to publish).

entries.title: Better AI Responses by Default
entries.description: New projects start with smart default settings (Top K = 15) for quality responses.

entries.title: Helpful Mobile Tooltips
entries.description: Clear guidance on mobile when a file can't be processed.

entries.title: Smarter Syllabot Setup
entries.description: Reminder to upload a syllabus before configuring the AI; disappears once uploaded.

entries.title: Analytics Tracking Added
entries.description: Interactions across Compare, Chat, and App Viewer now tracked via Google Analytics.

entries.title: Improved Voice Input
entries.description: Pause/resume mic without losing input; delete or re-record spoken text.

entries.title: Better Readability
entries.description: Improved color contrast throughout Builder.

entries.title: CSV Uploads Reliability
entries.description: Fixed CSV upload failures and freezing from decoding issues.

entries.title: Cleaner Knowledge Base Columns
entries.description: Consistent column names/order across Files, URLs, and Google Drive tabs.

entries.title: Mobile Tooltip Glitch Fix
entries.description: Tooltips no longer stay stuck after scrolling on mobile.

entries.title: Chat Tooltip Cleanup
entries.description: Tooltips now disappear properly when scrolling or switching tabs.

entries.title: Modal Accessibility Fixes
entries.description: Easier screen reader/keyboard navigation for "Report a Problem" and "Give Feedback" dialogs.

entries.title: Improved Sliders
entries.description: Screen readers now announce labels and values for Temperature and Top K sliders.

entries.title: Keyboard-Friendly Compare Tool
entries.description: Scroll through Compare results using standard keyboard controls.

entries.title: Cleaner Tab Navigation
entries.description: Improved screen reader and keyboard tab navigation, aligned with Web Accessibility standards.

entries.title: In-App Notification Banners
entries.description: Time-stamped alerts across key pages (Dashboard, Builder, Marketplace) for important updates.

entries.title: Expanded URL Ingestion
entries.description: Ingest any URL into a project's Knowledge Base; ASU URLs use iSearch with Firecrawl fallback.

entries.title: Project Analytics Dashboard
entries.description: Project-level engagement and activity metrics in one place in Builder.

entries.title: Improved Feedback Experience
entries.description: Confirmation message shown after reporting a message in Chat.

entries.title: Added File Type Help Link
entries.description: "See all accepted file types" link to a help article.

entries.title: Improved Prompt Validation
entries.description: "Generate" button disabled until a prompt is entered, preventing empty submissions.

entries.title: Tooltip for Partially Processed Files
entries.description: Indicates if a file wasn't fully uploaded, with re-upload guidance.

entries.title: Mobile Link Styling Fix
entries.description: Fixed links appearing incorrectly bright blue on mobile.

entries.title: Project Status Display Fix
entries.description: Projects no longer marked "Live" unless explicitly published.

entries.title: Project Tab Navigation Fix
entries.description: Projects consistently open to the Basic Settings tab.

entries.title: Firecrawl Root URL Fix
entries.description: Fixed backend bug preventing depth-0 URLs from crawling correctly.

entries.title: Responsive Layout Fix
entries.description: Knowledge Base header now displays correctly on smaller screens.

entries.title: Mobile Chat Renaming Fix
entries.description: Chat names can be edited on mobile without sidebar collapse or losing keyboard focus.

entries.title: Sharing Input Validation
entries.description: Projects can only be shared with valid ASURITE usernames or emails.

entries.title: Google Drive Refresh Fix
entries.description: Fixed refresh failures for files containing slashes in their names.

entries.title: Mobile Notification Banner Layout Fix
entries.description: Resolved overlapping sidebar/banner issues; banners stay pinned on scroll.

entries.title: Marketplace Launch
entries.description: Share projects with the ASU community; ASU-wide projects appear automatically.

entries.title: Claude 4.5 Haiku Integration
entries.description: Claude 4.5 Haiku now available, offering improved performance.

entries.title: Image Paste Support
entries.description: Paste images directly into text fields across Chat and Platform apps.

entries.title: Role-Based Filtering for Projects
entries.description: Filter by Role (Owner/Editor) on the MyAI Projects page.

entries.title: Project Sharing UI Improvements
entries.description: No duplicate ASURITEs; role dropdowns stay accessible; delete works consistently.

entries.title: Scrollable Sidebar Navigation
entries.description: Prevents overlapping menu items.

entries.title: Improved Long Project Name Display
entries.description: Long names wrap or truncate correctly in sidebar and Analytics Dashboard.

entries.title: Mobile Interaction Enhancements
entries.description: Tabs respond on first tap; "New Chat" icon fully visible across devices.

entries.title: Copy Button Stability
entries.description: Interface no longer shakes on hover; tooltips display correctly.

entries.title: OpenAI Retry Logic
entries.description: New retry system handles API rate limits, timeouts, and intermittent issues.

entries.title: Media API Upload Behavior
entries.description: Upload status shows "updating" until processing completes.

entries.title: Excel Upload Reliability
entries.description: Excel documents now upload to the Knowledge Base without errors.

entries.title: Google Drive Sync for Knowledge Base
entries.description: Sync Google Drive files with the Knowledge Base; manual sync and clear error messages.

entries.title: Smarter Source Awareness in KB
entries.description: The AI knows which file each answer came from and can cite filename or URL.

entries.title: Production Launch
entries.description: Platform officially moved from beta to production at platform.aiml.asu.edu, accessible to all ASU faculty and staff.

entries.title: Improved Chat Stability
entries.description: Older messages auto-condense in long chats while recent messages stay intact.

entries.title: Improved Model Selection
entries.description: Removed deprecated model options to reduce confusion.

entries.title: Larger Custom Instructions Box
entries.description: Expands to a larger, more readable size when clicked.

entries.title: Deprecated Models Removed
entries.description: Claude 2, Claude 2.1, and Claude Instant removed following Anthropic's deprecation.

entries.title: Special Characters in File Names
entries.description: Files with characters like +, @, # now upload without errors.

entries.title: "Report a Problem" Form Fix
entries.description: Fixed false "Please select a project" error on submission.

entries.title: Chat Feedback Form Submission Fix
entries.description: Fixed "Rating is required" error blocking submission even when a rating was selected.

entries.title: Full Screen Button Fix
entries.description: Full screen button now properly expands the selected model's response.

entries.title: File Upload Error When Switching Chats
entries.description: Files and prompts now clear properly when starting or switching chats.

entries.title: Logout Fully Logs Users Out
entries.description: Fixed cookies not clearing, leaving users signed in after logout.

entries.title: Model Names Stick to Original Messages
entries.description: Responses retain the model name used at generation time, even after switching models.

entries.title: Top-K Slider Minimum Value Fix
entries.description: Slider now sends a valid minimum value instead of 0.

entries.title: Increased TPM Limits
entries.description: All projects upgraded to 750K Tokens Per Minute; higher increases available on request.

entries.title: Custom AI Response Display Name
entries.description: Builders can customize the AI response name shown to end users.

entries.title: AI Project Privacy Disclaimer
entries.description: Standard privacy message added to all projects, with optional custom disclaimer.

entries.title: Improved Model Selection + Default to Nova Micro
entries.description: Redesigned model menu; new projects default to fast, cost-effective Nova Micro.

entries.title: Viewer Sidebar Toggle
entries.description: Builders can hide the conversation history sidebar from viewers.

entries.title: Google Drive Integration
entries.description: Import files directly from ASU Google Drive into Builder.

entries.title: Updated Dashboard Hero
entries.description: Refreshed for clarity and ASU branding alignment.

entries.title: Template Renaming
entries.description: "Neurabot" renamed to "Friendly AI Explainer"; "Ask me bot!" simplified to "Ask me!" to reduce jargon.

entries.title: Sidebar Tabs Unclickable Fix
entries.description: Fixed unresponsive sidebar tabs after navigating via a Share link.

entries.title: Editor Permission Dropdown Fix
entries.description: Editors now correctly limited to assigning "Can view" permissions only.

entries.title: Unsaved Changes Warning Modal
entries.description: Warns before leaving a project with unsaved changes, with save/discard options.

entries.title: Updated Product Names
entries.description: MyAI Builder, ASU GPT, and Model Comparison renamed to CreateAI Builder, CreateAI Chat, and CreateAI Compare.

entries.title: Chat Memory Toggle Renamed
entries.description: Updated chat memory setting under Behaviors tab, enabled by default.

entries.title: UI Copy and Branding Updates
entries.description: Text improvements across the project builder for clarity and ASU branding.

entries.title: CSV/XLSX Upload Fix
entries.description: Fixed inability to upload .csv and .xlsx files via the chatbot interface.

entries.title: Ask Me Bot Placeholder Fix
entries.description: Placeholder text now correctly stays as "I want to..." after backspacing.

entries.title: Custom Prompt Text Display Fix
entries.description: Custom "Prompt box text" now appears correctly in the published app.

entries.title: Knowledge Base Upload Spinner Restored
entries.description: Loading spinner now displays correctly during file processing.

entries.title: Project Creation Instructions Updated
entries.description: Clearer guidance text for entering project name and subtitle.

entries.title: URL Preview Error Fix
entries.description: Fixed confusing error when previewing a URL in the Knowledge Base.

entries.title: Self-Access Removal Prevention
entries.description: Users can no longer remove themselves as owners or downgrade their own role.

entries.title: "Make a Copy" Viewer Fix
entries.description: Hid the "Make a copy" option from viewer-only users to prevent errors.

entries.title: Improved Project Link Sharing
entries.description: Share links now always point to the main project page.

entries.title: "Access Denied" Own App Fix
entries.description: Project creators can now preview their own apps without errors.

entries.title: Introducing the CreateAI Toolkit
entries.description: MyAI Builder, ASU GPT, and Model Comparison renamed to Builder, Chat, and Compare; CreateAI Platform added as the developer layer.

entries.title: Builder Major Interface Upgrade
entries.description: Redesigned interface and smarter onboarding guidance for building AI projects.

entries.title: New Models
entries.description: Claude 4 Opus, Claude 4 Sonnet, Llama 4 Maverick, Llama 4 Scout, Nova Premier added.

entries.title: Chat Sorting Improvement
entries.description: Sidebar now sorts conversations by most recent activity rather than creation date.

entries.title: Custom Bot Names Retained
entries.description: Custom bot names persist in chat responses instead of reverting.

entries.title: Secure Project Access
entries.description: Editors can no longer use owner tokens to alter unrelated projects.

entries.title: Photo Response Regenerate Fix
entries.description: Users can regenerate photo responses without the chat breaking.

entries.title: Improved Sharing Limits
entries.description: Projects can now be shared with up to 30 users at once, up from 10.

entries.title: New Models: GPT-4.1 Nano and o3
entries.description: New model options added.

entries.title: Invite List Auto-Save
entries.description: Invite list no longer clears when navigating away before sending invites.

entries.title: Project Copy Freezing Fix
entries.description: Copying a project with a duplicate name shows a clear error instead of freezing.

entries.title: Enter Key Rename Fix
entries.description: Pressing Enter while renaming a project now submits correctly.

entries.title: Owner Role Dropdown Removed
entries.description: Non-editable "Owner" field no longer appears clickable.

entries.title: Feedback Button Error Resolved
entries.description: Thumbs up/down buttons work properly without error messages.

entries.title: Chat Sidebar Instant Updates
entries.description: New and deleted chats now appear/disappear instantly.

entries.title: Top K Minimum Value Fix
entries.description: Top K setting now has a minimum value of 1.

entries.title: Knowledge Base Upload Fix
entries.description: Fixed .txt and other file uploads breaking project setup.

entries.title: Chat Rename Instant Update
entries.description: Renamed chats reflect changes immediately.

entries.title: Chat Dropdown Menu Improved
entries.description: All options (Edit, Copy, Share, Print, Delete) are fully clickable.

entries.title: Image Preview Stability
entries.description: Image previews remain stable during response generation.

entries.title: Share Projects with the ASU Community
entries.description: Switch sharing from "Invite Only" to ASU-wide access via the Share menu.

entries.title: Easier Bug Reporting & Feedback
entries.description: "Report a Problem" and "Give Feedback" forms with description and screenshot support.

entries.title: Web App Toggle Auto Enable
entries.description: New projects auto-enable the Web App toggle for instant previews.

entries.title: Cleaner Project Organization
entries.description: Collaborator projects now appear under "Shared Projects."

entries.title: One Click Code Copy
entries.description: Copy code from AI responses instantly without manual highlighting.

entries.title: Auto Enabled Asset Search
entries.description: Uploaded files and URLs automatically activate Asset Search.

entries.title: Seamless Chat Switching
entries.description: Switch between chat sessions without loading issues.

entries.title: Smooth Scrolling
entries.description: Scroll freely while responses stream without being forced to the bottom.

entries.title: Print Conversations
entries.description: Print any chat directly from the menu.

entries.title: New Models
entries.description: Claude 3.7 Sonnet, Llama3 (405B/1B/3B/11B/90B), Nova (Lite/Micro/Pro), Gemini 2 (Flash/Flash Lite/Flash Pro), O3 Mini added.

entries.title: Seamless Navigation Across CreateAI Apps
entries.description: Click links within Builder to access other CreateAI apps directly.

entries.title: Friendlier Tooltips/Help Messages
entries.description: Updated to more user-friendly language for publishing and Knowledge Base steps.

entries.title: Structured LLM Output
entries.description: Enabled structured-format API output for supporting models.

entries.title: Enhanced Builder Guidance
entries.description: Improved user guidance on how to build an AI project.

entries.title: New Models: Gemini 2.0
entries.description: Added; Gemini 1.0 deprecated.

entries.title: File Upload Toggle Save Fix
entries.description: Fixed file upload toggle not saving.

entries.title: Math Symbol Display Fix
entries.description: Fixed errors displaying math symbols in input/output.

entries.title: Improved Access Control for Private Bots
entries.description: Private bots hidden from unauthorized users; access denied without permissions.

entries.title: Enhanced Collaborator Management
entries.description: Search, filter, sort, and bulk-select collaborators in the Share Panel.

entries.title: Dynamic Model Management
entries.description: Model configurations fetched from the backend instead of hardcoded constants.

entries.title: Starred Projects at Top
entries.description: Starred projects now appear at the top of the project list.

entries.title: Automated Welcome Emails
entries.description: New users receive a welcome email with login details and support resources.

entries.title: AI Help Button
entries.description: In-app AI-powered Help Button for support and navigation assistance.

entries.title: File Metadata Tracking
entries.description: Metadata extraction for 36 file formats, including DOCX page numbers, PPTX slide numbers, CSV row numbers.

entries.title: Document Upload for Single Conversations
entries.description: Upload documents/images for a single conversation only; not saved to the Knowledge Base.

entries.title: Skills & Jobs Matching
entries.description: Students can upload resumes via the ASU Pockets API in the mobile app to get relevant skills matches.

entries.title: Dynamic User Role Management
entries.description: API for updating user roles via a dropdown interface.

entries.title: Improved Sharing Management
entries.description: Dedicated "Share" button in the app header for managing project permissions.

entries.title: Improved Security Controls
entries.description: Stricter access controls to prevent unauthorized access to Chat environments.

entries.title: Skills API Integration
entries.description: Lambda function vectorizing 32,000 skills with automated weekly updates.

entries.title: API Key Management Infrastructure
entries.description: Updated infrastructure for key generation, revocation, and authentication.

entries.title: Lightcast Skills API Workflows
entries.description: Resolved workflows ensuring seamless taxonomy metadata updates.

entries.title: Multi-Function Calling
entries.description: Released in the Agentic Framework, supporting complex API workflows with caching and rate limiting.

entries.title: Enhanced Builder Interface
entries.description: Improved modal design and advanced/basic tab navigation.

entries.title: Expanded Model Access
entries.description: Chat expanded with all AI models for broader usage and selection.

entries.title: Optimized HR Document Vision
entries.description: Improved paper document extraction for BFIT projects.

entries.title: Role-Based Access Controls
entries.description: Simplified user permissions and improved collaboration workflows.

entries.title: Content Ingestion
entries.description: Flexible content ingestion and extended data integration capabilities.

entries.title: Gemini Pro 1.5 Released
entries.description: Added to the model lineup.

entries.title: System Observability Improvements
entries.description: Improvements to system observability across AI services for resilience.

entries.title: Upgraded Monitoring Tools
entries.description: Ensures resilience and reliability under high-demand conditions.

entries.title: Beta Access Management
entries.description: Advanced tools for managing beta requests and onboarding.

entries.title: Improved Settings Usability
entries.description: Improved usability for Basic and Advanced settings management.

entries.title: Builder v1.1
entries.description: New Knowledge Base and URL ingestion capabilities.

entries.title: Automated Role-Based Access Controls
entries.description: Simplified user permissions and improved collaboration workflows toolkit-wide.

entries.title: New Models: OpenAI O1, O1 Mini, Gemini Pro 1.5
entries.description: Added to the model lineup.

entries.title: Enhanced Model Comparison Beta
entries.description: Side-by-side testing of different AI models for better evaluation.

entries.title: Upgraded System Monitoring
entries.description: Improved observability tools for resilience and reliability.

entries.title: Enhanced Infrastructure Visibility
entries.description: Improved visibility across LLM services for performance and stability.

entries.title: Multimodal Support
entries.description: Send prompts with images and text for richer interactions.

entries.title: Voice-to-Text
entries.description: Send prompts using voice commands hands-free.

entries.title: Prompt Mode
entries.description: Use own data exclusively or combine with the system's language model knowledge.

entries.description: New advanced configurations for greater control over AI project data.

entries.description: Quicker response times by reducing redundant LLM calls.

entries.title: Search Type
entries.description: Choose detailed chunks or full documents for search results.

entries.title: Increased User Load Capacity
